def positive_hardcoded_path_string():
    rule_id = "hardcoded_path_string"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Hardcoded filesystem path literals assigned inside non-test Python functions."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
